description: LiteLLM AI usage and cost monitoring dashboard

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  formatDateTime(toDate(startTime), '%Y-%m-%d') AS day,
  sum(spend) AS daily_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  AND startTime <= now()
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY min(toDate(startTime)) ASC

spec.description: Total AI spend aggregated by day for the past 7 days.
spec.title: Daily Usage Cost ($) - Past 7 Days

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(startTime) AS time,
  sum(spend) AS hourly_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: AI spend broken down by hour within the selected time range.
spec.title: Hourly Spend ($)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  api_key,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend,
  count(*) AS request_count,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND api_key IS NOT NULL
  AND api_key != ''
GROUP BY api_key
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top 10 API keys ranked by total spend.
spec.title: Top API keys by spend

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  api_key,
  count(*) AS request_count,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND api_key IS NOT NULL
  AND api_key != ''
GROUP BY api_key
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top 10 API keys by request volume.
spec.title: Top API keys by requests

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total AI spend within the selected dashboard time range.
spec.title: Total Spend ($)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  countIf(status = 'failure') / count(*) * 100 AS failure_rate
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Percentage of AI requests that failed within the selected time range.
spec.title: Failure Rate

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  end_user,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND end_user != ''
GROUP BY end_user
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  end_user,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND end_user != ''
GROUP BY end_user
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10
SELECT sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens_used FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total AI tokens consumed within the selected dashboard time range.
spec.title: Total Tokens Used

spec.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS total_ai_request FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total number of AI API calls within the selected dashboard time range.
spec.title: Total AI Requests

spec.rawSql: SELECT avg(total_tokens) AS avg_tokens_per_request FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Average number of tokens consumed per AI request.
spec.title: Avg Tokens / Request

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  model,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top 10 models ranked by token usage in the selected time range.
spec.title: Tokens by Model

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  model,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top 10 models ranked by total spend in the selected time range.
spec.title: Spend by Model

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  status,
  count(request_id) AS request_count
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 100

spec.description: Number of successful vs failed AI requests within the selected time range.
spec.title: Requests by Status

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeInterval(startTime) AS time,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC
LIMIT 1000

spec.description: Token consumption over time. Use to spot usage spikes and trends.
spec.title: Token Usage Over Time

spec.rawSql: SELECT avg(spend) AS avg_spend_per_request FROM "litellm_prod"."LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Average cost per AI API request within the selected time range.
spec.title: Avg Spend / Request

title: LiteLLM AI Usage & Cost Monitor
